name: Streak
description: Manage Streak (CRM inside Gmail) pipelines, boxes, contacts, fields from any AI agent. 9 tools, basic-auth with API key.
instructions:
This connector wraps the Streak REST API v1/v2 (api.streak.com/api).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://www.streak.com → top-right gear → **Settings → API keys → Generate API key**.
2. Copy the key. Set `STREAK_API_KEY`.

**Authentication**: HTTP Basic — API key is the username, password is empty:
  `Authorization: Basic base64(API_KEY:)`

**Streak vocabulary**:
- **Pipeline** = a CRM workflow (e.g. 'Sales', 'Hiring').
- **Box** = a record/deal/case inside a pipeline.
- **Stage** = pipeline column (e.g. 'Lead', 'Qualified', 'Closed Won').
- **Field** = custom field on a pipeline (definition) or box (value).

**Two API versions**: v1 covers everything; v2 has a few newer write endpoints with cleaner shapes (see `pipelines/v2`).

**IDs are URL-safe strings** (e.g. `agxzfm1haWxmb29nYWVyEAsSBE5vdGUYgIDA88-IpAoMogEFc3RyZWFr`).

**Pagination**: `limit` + `sortDirection`; some endpoints use `lastId` cursor.

**Rate limits**: 600 req/hour per API key; 10 burst. 429 → back off 6s.

**Out of scope here**: snippets (email templates), team management, billing.

tools.name: streak_current_user
tools.description: Returns the authenticated user: userKey, displayName, email, isOauth, lastSeenTimestamp.

tools.name: streak_list_pipelines
tools.description: List all pipelines the user has access to. Each has pipelineKey, name, description, stages[], fields[], creatorKey, teamKey.

tools.name: streak_get_pipeline
tools.description: Get one pipeline with stages and field definitions.

tools.name: streak_list_boxes
tools.description: List boxes (records) in a pipeline. Each has boxKey, name, stageKey, fields (custom field values), notes count, files count.

tools.name: streak_get_box
tools.description: Get one box with full custom-field values, assigned users, linked contacts, and Gmail thread refs.

tools.name: streak_create_box
tools.description: Create a new box in a pipeline.

assignedToSharingEntries.description: Array of {sharedEntity} user keys to assign.

tools.name: streak_update_box
tools.description: Update a box: rename, move stage, set custom field values.

tools.name: streak_list_box_notes
tools.description: List notes attached to a box.

tools.name: streak_add_box_note
tools.description: Add a text note to a box.
